use_cases: Display user profiles with name and designation on avatar hover in team directories
Show contextual information about team members or collaborators on hover
Create interactive user cards with spring-based motion animations
Add micro-interactions to avatar grids in dashboards or member lists
Enhance UI with non-intrusive hover-reveal tooltips for user identification
ai_summary: An animated tooltip component featuring user avatars with spring-based motion effects that rotate and translate based on mouse position. The tooltip reveals user name and designation on hover with smooth animations. Built with motion/react for fluid interactions, commonly used in team directories, member lists, or collaborative interfaces.
